NAME: Divay Aggarwal
SUMMARY: Results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in systems development using \textbf{C++ programming} and \textbf{Python scripting}. Proven experience in the \textbf{Platform Systems} domain, building scalable \textbf{Linux-based infrastructure} and reliable system software components handling high-volume workloads. Proficient in \textbf{Systems Programming}, \textbf{Operating Systems}, and \textbf{Bash automation scripting}. Passionate about debugging complex \textbf{Linux subsystems} and improving system reliability through \textbf{automated testing} and efficient concurrency handling techniques.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Spearheading the system-level architecture of \textbf{"Redbooks"}, a mission-critical financial ledger platform facilitating automated accounting and auditing for over \textbf{\$5M+ in monthly transactions}.

Engineered complex \textbf{Python modules} to encapsulate "posting criteria logic," automating the generation of \textbf{AR/AP Invoices, Journal Entries, and Credit Memos} with strict \textbf{ACID compliance}.

Designed resilient \textbf{ETL pipelines} using \textbf{Python automation tools} to synchronize \textbf{50,000+ daily records} from mid-office servers to the Redbooks, ensuring 99.9\% data consistency.
Debugged \textbf{Linux-based production issues} across services and optimized \textbf{PostgreSQL} queries, reducing execution latency by \textbf{35\%} under peak workloads.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Architected a \textbf{Smart Budget Management System} for Linux platforms, designing efficient \textbf{data processing algorithms} to predict billing trends with \textbf{92\% accuracy}.
Engineered granular \textbf{Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)}, defining distinct dashboard views and permissions for \textbf{Super Admins, CEOs, and Managers} to oversee budget allotments.

projects.title: LinuxSysOps (System Monitoring and Debugging Tool)
projects.tech: C++, Python, Linux OS, Bash, Networking
bullets: Developed a systems-level monitoring tool using \textbf{C++} to track \textbf{process scheduling, memory usage, and I/O operations} across Linux environments.
Built \textbf{Python and Bash automation scripts} to parse system logs and detect anomalies, reducing debugging time by \textbf{45\%} in high-load scenarios.
Integrated \textbf{network and filesystem diagnostics} to analyze real-time system behavior, improving reliability and fault detection in distributed setups.

projects.title: FileStack (Custom Storage and Filesystem Simulator)
projects.tech: C++, Python, Linux OS, Bash, ext4
bullets: Designed a \textbf{custom filesystem simulator} using \textbf{C++}, implementing core concepts like \textbf{inode structures, block allocation, and caching mechanisms}.
Implemented \textbf{Linux-based testing utilities} with \textbf{Python} to simulate concurrent file operations and validate consistency under load.
Optimized \textbf{read/write performance} using caching strategies, improving throughput and ensuring data integrity across simulated storage layers.
